mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, content, category_id, view_count, like_count, comment_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM posts WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 0

SELECT * FROM posts
status != 0
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY view_count DESC
ORDER BY like_count DESC
ORDER BY comment_count DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE status != 0
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category_id = #{categoryId}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
